content.en:
Ye Tian was not short of resources, so in these five billion eternal years, his strength had improved a lot.

Under the accumulation of countless resources, Ye Tian raised the Extreme Dao Void Body to the Perfection Realm, and the Extreme Dao Ancestral Power to the limit of the Extreme Dao Realm Perfect Controller.

And the Extreme Dao will has also improved a lot, and now he has condensed the six-layer will pagoda.

Every time the Pagoda of Will condenses an additional layer, the amount of Extreme Will required has to be doubled, so the six-story Pagoda of Will is already a very exaggerated grade.

Maybe the Pagoda of Will condensed by some of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers is not as tall as his!

In addition, under his hard work, the Space Pole Dao, the Time Pole Dao, the Sword Pole Dao, and the Defense Pole Dao were all cultivated by him to the consummation realm.

It's a pity that Ye Tian's Extreme Dao of Light still hasn't reached the limit level, but it has improved a little bit compared to the beginning.

If the distance between the Consummation Realm and the Extreme Realm is described as a percentage, then Ye Tian was in the 10% realm at the beginning, and now he is in the 30% realm.

【Satisfactory 30%】

This progress is more aptly described.

"It is really difficult to comprehend an extreme path to the extreme level, I have spent so much extreme miscanthus white grass, but I still haven't succeeded in comprehending the extreme path of light at the extreme level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Right now, Ye Tian's strength is the true Realm Perfect Controller's realm invincible, just like when he was a super perfect controller.

However, if he wants to be promoted from the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm to the Perfect Controller of the True Realm, Ye Tian can't do it yet, he needs to raise the Endless Extreme Dao to the Dacheng Realm before he can break the shackles.

The Extreme Path is one of the necessary conditions for becoming a perfect master of the True Realm, although several of his Extreme Paths have been completed, but his own Extreme Path is still a small realm.

If Ye Tian broke through with other extreme paths, it would be okay, but his own foundation would be damaged, and the gains outweighed the losses.

Therefore, he had to raise the Endless Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm before he could break through, and it would take a long time.

"Next, we still have to create a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique to greatly improve our strength!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Extreme Dao Control Techniques created by the Super Perfect Masters are all ordinary Extreme Dao Control Techniques, and even the Infinite Realm Perfect Masters only have ordinary Extreme Control Skills, and only a few True Realm Perfect Masters are sure to create top Extreme Control Skills.

If you want to create a top-notch Extreme Dao Mastery Technique, you need to at least cultivate an Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm, which is the minimum requirement.

In fact, the existence that can create a top-notch Extreme Dao control technique has basically comprehended an Extreme Path of the Perfection Realm.

Now, Ye Tian had already comprehended several Extreme Dao of the Consummation Realm, so if he went to create a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique, the success rate would naturally be very high.

"The power of the top extreme control technique is extremely terrifying, when the Lord of the Dragon and Snake killed my copy body, it was a top extreme control technique, in the face of the top extreme control technique, the general extreme control technique can't compete at all!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian tried to create a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique involving the Extreme Dao of Light.

Currently, he has the highest attainments in the Extreme Path of Light, making it easier for him to create top-notch Extreme Path Mastery Techniques.

Of course, it can also be fused with other poles.

At this time, he suddenly remembered the sword of the Lord of the Dragon and Serpent.

To this day, the edge of that sword remains in his heart, as if he can see that sword with a little contemplation.

"Maybe you can imitate the edge of that sword, fuse the Extreme Dao of Sword and the Extreme Dao of Light, and create a top-notch Extreme Dao control technique. "

So, according to this idea, Ye Tian began to create a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique.

Time passes slowly –

A billion eternal years!

Two billion eternal years!

Three billion eternal years!

......

Before you know it, 13 billion eternal years have passed.

Ye Tian underestimated the difficulty of creating a top-level Extreme Dao Control Technique, even though his attainments in the Extreme Dao of Light were very high, but those powerhouses who could create a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique, hadn't it taken countless billions of eternal years to create a top-notch Control Technique?

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to create a top-level Extreme Dao Control Technique in a short period of time, it would be almost impossible, unless he comprehended the Extreme Dao of the extreme level, he could easily create a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique.

this day.

Ye Tian practiced an Extreme Dao Control Technique in the void at the end of the realm.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian stabbed out with the Extreme Dao Treasure Exterminating Dao Sword in his hand, and a white sword light shattered the endless time and space, directly erasing a forbidden place in a certain area of the end of the realm.

And this sword seems to have touched a special boundary, and a black area seems to be about to emerge.

"What's that?"

Ye Tian sensed a terrifying aura from the black area, but in a moment, the black area disappeared.

"It should be that the power of the top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique I just created has reached a certain level that triggered that black area?"

As a result, Ye Tian once again used the top extreme control technique just now.

Burst!!!!

Endless space-time was pierced, and a black area emerged, but disappeared again in an instant.

Both times, black areas surfaced, which proved that Ye Tian's guess was not wrong.

"Perhaps the Lord of the Ancients knows the origin of the black zone. "

Ye Tian guessed.

"The top Extreme Dao Control Technique has been created, let's take a name, it's called Extreme Mang Sword Light!" Ye Tian decided.

After creating the top Extreme Dao Control Technique, the Extreme Mang Sword Light, Ye Tian's strength increased by a cut and reached another level.

He now even had the hope of killing a weaker True Realm Perfect Master, comparable to those who were extremely powerful.

......

No Road Tower.

Ye Tianlai asked the Lord of Canggu.

"Ye Tian, you are here, it seems that your cultivation has improved well, you have reached the limit of the perfect controller of the virtual realm, you only need to raise your extreme path to Dacheng, you can break through to the perfect controller of the true realm!" said the Lord of the Ancient with a smile.

"It's still very early to elevate one's extreme path to the realm of Dacheng, I came this time to ask the Lord of Canggu one thing. Ye Tian said.

"Oh, what's that?"

The Lord of the Ancient was curious.

"When I was practicing an Extreme Dao control technique, I saw a strange black area, what is it?" Ye Tian asked.

"Black Zone!!!!" The Lord of Canggu was shocked, "Ye Tian, you shouldn't have created a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique." "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"No wonder, otherwise, no matter how strong you are, it will be difficult to see that place!" said the Lord of the Ancients.

Immediately, the Lord of Canggu told Ye Tian about the origin of the black area.
